# Acme Billing Help Center QA | Billing answers

Curated billing pack for customer-visible billing answers.

## Core Answers

- Refund policy: How refunds work, who qualifies, and when payment returns land. (https://answers.example.com/refunds/page.md)

## Additional Context

- How do I cancel my subscription?: How to cancel a subscription, what happens to access, and where to confirm the change. (https://answers.example.com/cancel/page.md)
